# apm-structure-valid

.apm/ directory must contain skills/ or instructions/ with valid structure

| | |
|---|---|
| **Severity** | warning (auto) |
| **Autofix** | - |
| **Since** | v0.7.0 |
| **Category** | [APM (Agent Package Manager)](apm.md) |

## Configuration

```yaml
rules:
  apm-structure-valid:
    enabled: auto  # true | false | auto
    severity: warning
```


*Run `skillsaw explain apm-structure-valid` to see this documentation and the rule's effective configuration in your terminal.*
